risk_domain: The ISPS Code is a useful baseline for maritime and port security because its mandatory Part A covers requirements that SOLAS contracting governments, port authorities, and shipping companies must follow. Port State Control is also central because it verifies that foreign ships in national ports comply with international safety, security, manning, and pollution requirements.
title: The ISPS Code is a useful baseline for maritime and port security because its mandatory Part A covers requirements that SOLAS contracting governments, port authorities, and shipping companies must follow. Port State Control is also central because it verifies that foreign ships in national ports comply with international safety, security, manning, and pollution requirements. — core exposure
